name: @grocery-agent/worker
description: grocery-mcp: the Cloudflare Worker (MCP server + operator admin panel) and the plugin/vault build tooling that data repos run via reusable CI workflows.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p src/admin/client/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p admin/visual/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p app/visual/tsconfig.json
scripts.test:tooling: node --test tests/build-plugin.test.mjs tests/build-vault.test.mjs tests/merge-wrangler-config.test.mjs tests/stamp-readme-badge.test.mjs tests/strip-facets.test.mjs tests/check-licenses.test.mjs tests/source-hygiene.test.mjs
